name: devops-pipeline
prompt: Minimalist CI/CD pipeline flow. White background. Five circles connected by thin grey lines in horizontal layout: "Code" → "Build" → "Test" → "Deploy" → "Monitor". Each circle is just a thin grey outline with text inside. The "Deploy" circle has ember orange (#D95B43) outline instead of grey. Below each circle, tiny grey text with examples like "GitHub", "Docker", "Jest", "K8s", "Datadog". Clean, lots of white space, Inter font.
